input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.3.2
            TITLE: characteristics

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.3.2: Characteristics
T.9.3.2 Characteristics 
a. Be of the rotary mechanical type  
b. Be rigidly mounted to the vehicle and must not be removed during maintenance 
c. Mounted where the rotary axis of the key is near horizontal and across the vehicle 
d. The ON position must be in the horizontal position and must be marked accordingly  
e. The OFF position must be clearly marked  
f. (EV Only) Operated with a red removable key that must only be removable in the 
electrically open position

final_answer: rule T.9.3.2: Characteristics T.9.3.2 Characteristics a. Be of the rotary mechanical type b. Be rigidly mounted to the vehicle and must not be removed during maintenance c. Mounted where the rotary axis of the key is near horizontal and across the vehicle d. The ON position must be in the horizontal position and must be marked accordingly e. The OFF position must be clearly marked f. (EV Only) Operated with a red removable key that must only be removable in the electrically open position
